query: I am gluten-free. Make me a chicken pasta dish.
expected_behavior: Recipe MUST replace regular pasta/flour with a gluten-free option (rice/corn/chickpea pasta, GF flour). allergen_checker must flag wheat.
final_answer:
Gluten-Free Chicken Spaghetti

Source: https://www.fearlessdining.com/gluten-free-chicken-spaghetti/

Ingredients (6 servings)
- 12 oz gluten-free spaghetti, uncooked
- 1 1/2 lb chicken thighs (skin-on if available; boneless skinless also works)
- 1/2 cup diced onion
- 3 cloves garlic, minced
- 6 oz tomato paste
- 2 tsp dried thyme
- 2 tsp dried basil
- 1 tsp dried oregano
- 2 cups boiling water
- Salt and pepper, to taste

Topping
- 1/3 cup parmesan
- 3 tbsp gluten-free bread crumbs or panko
- 1 tsp lemon zest

Steps
1. If using boneless, skinless chicken, cook it in a skillet with a little oil for 3–4 minutes per side, then set aside. If using skin-on or bone-in chicken, brown the skin side in a Dutch oven with oil for about 5 minutes, then set aside.
2. Lower heat to medium and add the onion. Cook until translucent, then add the garlic and cook for 2 minutes.
3. Stir in the tomato paste, salt, pepper, thyme, basil, and oregano.
4. Add the gluten-free spaghetti, breaking it in half first.
5. Pour the boiling water over the pasta and toss to coat. Cover and simmer. If using skin-on chicken, place it skin-side up on top of the pasta. If using boneless chicken, keep it out for now.
6. After 5 minutes, use tongs or a fork to separate the spaghetti so it doesn’t clump.
7. Mix the parmesan, gluten-free bread crumbs, and lemon zest in a small bowl.
8. If using boneless chicken, place it on top of the pasta now. Sprinkle the topping over everything.
9. Broil for about 5 minutes until the topping is crisp and golden.

Notes
- This recipe is already gluten-free.
- The source says it can be made in about 25 minutes total.
- If you want, I can also adapt this into a dairy-free version while keeping it gluten-free.
